channel.title: Candid Crypto
channel.googleplay:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit
channel.description: A podcast for crypto beginners. https://candidcryptopodcast.com
channel.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit
channel.itunes:summary: Information and stories about Cryptocurrency. [NOTE: This podcast is currently on an indefinite pause as of November 2025. Thank you for listening!]
channel.itunes:subtitle: Candid crypto is a place for listeners to learn about the growing digital asset space - currently on indefinite pause.

item.title: Ep 1: DYOR (Do your own research)
item.description: When it comes to researching cryptocurrency, where do you start? Intro song: Screen Saver by Kevin MacLeod
item.itunes:title: Ep 001: DYOR (Do your own research)
item.itunes:summary: When it comes to researching crytpocurrency, where do you start? Intro song: Screen Saver by Kevin MacLeod
item.itunes:subtitle: When it comes to researching crytpocurrency, where do you start?
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 002: What is Bitcoin?
item.description: Who made Bitcoin, how does it work, and what is a blockchain?
item.itunes:title: Ep 002: What is Bitcoin?
item.itunes:summary: Who made Bitcoin, how does it work, and what is a blockchain?
item.itunes:subtitle: Everything BTC
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 003: What is Ethereum?
item.description: The computational blockchain. Why is a programmable blockchain important? What's a DAO? Why buy an NFT?
item.itunes:title: Ep 003: What is Ethereum?
item.itunes:summary: The computational blockchain. Why is a programmable blockchain important? What's a DAO? Why buy an NFT?
item.itunes:subtitle: Ethereum, the computational blockchain.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 004: Exchanges
item.description: Everything exchanges. What is KYC? What makes an exchange centralized vs decentralized?
item.itunes:title: Ep 004: Exchanges
item.itunes:summary: Everything exchanges. What is KYC? What makes an exchange centralized vs decentralized?
item.itunes:subtitle: Everything exchanges.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 005: Crazy Crypto Stories
item.description: Michael shares stories from the crypto world.
item.itunes:title: Ep 005: Crazy Crypto Stories
item.itunes:summary: Michael shares stories from the crypto world.
item.itunes:subtitle: Michael shares stories from the crypto world.
item.itunes:author: Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 006: Stablecoins
item.description: The almighty dollar, in digital form. Why use stablecoins over traditional fiat? Who issues these things? Find out in this weeks episode!
item.itunes:title: Ep 006: Stablecoins
item.itunes:summary: The almighty dollar, in digital form. Why use stablecoins over traditional fiat? Who issues these things? Find out in this weeks episode!
item.itunes:subtitle: The almighty dollar, in digital form.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 007: NFTs
item.description: How are NTFs currently being used in the real world? What goes into making an NFT? Find out on this week's episode!
item.itunes:title: Ep 007: NFTs
item.itunes:summary: How are NTFs currently being used in the real world? What goes into making an NFT?
item.itunes:subtitle: NFT use cases, and building them yourself.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 008: Basic Attention Token
item.description: BAT and brave. How is brave different than other web browsers? Well, you get paid to use it, in crypto! Plus, it blocks ads everywhere.
item.itunes:title: Ep 008: Basic Attention Token
item.itunes:summary: BAT and brave. How is brave different than other web browsers? Well, you get paid to use it, in crypto! Plus, it blocks ads everywhere.
item.itunes:subtitle: BAT and brave.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 009: Cardano
item.description: The academic blockchain. What's different about Cardano?
item.itunes:title: Ep 009: Cardano
item.itunes:summary: The academic blockchain. What's different about Cardano?
item.itunes:subtitle: Cardano and ADA.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 010: Wallets
item.description: Cryptocurrency wallets. "Not your keys, not your coins".
item.itunes:title: Ep 010: Wallets
item.itunes:summary: Cryptocurrency wallets. "Not your keys, not your coins".
item.itunes:subtitle: Cryptocurrency wallets.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 011: Crazy Crypto Stories Pt. II
item.description: Crazy crypto stories is back! Liam and Michael face off in an epic story battle.
item.itunes:title: Ep 011: Crazy Crypto Stories Pt. II
item.itunes:summary: Crazy crypto stories is back! Liam and Michael face off in an epic story battle.
item.itunes:subtitle: Whose story won: Liam or Michael?
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 012: Mining
item.description: Bitcoin, the rare earth metal of the internet. We talk about crypto mining from a high-level perspective, and share our personal experiences. Why did China ban mining? What does it take to mine?
item.itunes:title: Ep 012: Mining
item.itunes:summary: Bitcoin, the rare earth metal of the internet. We talk about crypto mining from a high-level perspective, and share our personal experiences. Why did China ban mining? What does it take to mine?
item.itunes:subtitle: Grab your graphics cards, we're mining for Bitcoins.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 013: Mining Pt 2
item.description: Liam tackles the technical aspects of mining. What is actually in a block? Sources: https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/how-bitcoin-mining-really-works-38563ec38c87/ https://www.investopedia.com/terms/b/bitcoin-mining.asp https://en.bitcoin.it/wiki/Block
item.itunes:title: Ep 013: Mining Pt 2
item.itunes:summary: Liam tackles the technical aspects of mining. What is actually in a block? Sources: https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/how-bitcoin-mining-really-works-38563ec38c87/ https://www.investopedia.com/terms/b/bitcoin-mining.asp https://en.bitcoin.it/wiki/Block
item.itunes:subtitle: Liam tackles the technical aspects of mining.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 014: Investing vs Trading
item.description: Crypto enthusiasts can be broken down into two categories: Investors, and traders. What's the difference?
item.itunes:title: Ep 014: Investing vs Trading
item.itunes:summary: Crypto enthusiasts can be broken down into two categories: Investors and traders. What's the difference?
item.itunes:subtitle: Investors and traders. What's the difference?
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 015: Privacy Coins
item.description: The true "digital cash" of the internet. We talk about incentives to use privacy coins, and why they freak some people out.
item.itunes:title: Ep 015: Privacy Coins
item.itunes:summary: The true "digital cash" of the internet. We talk about incentives to use privacy coins, and why they freak some people out.
item.itunes:subtitle: The true "digital cash" of the internet. We talk about incentives to use privacy coins, and why they freak some people out.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 016: Chainlink
item.description: Taking data and putting it on the blockchain.
item.itunes:title: Ep 016: Chainlink
item.itunes:summary: Taking data and putting it on the blockchain.
item.itunes:subtitle: Taking data and putting it on the blockchain.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 018: Polkadot
item.description: A protocol that allows arbitrary data to be transferred across any blockchain. We dig into the project, and present an earnest perspective on what it offers.
item.itunes:title: Ep 018: Polkadot
item.itunes:summary: A protocol that allows arbitrary data to be transferred across any blockchain. We dig into the project, and present an earnest perspective on what it offers.
item.itunes:subtitle: A protocol that allows arbitrary data to be transferred across any blockchain.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 019: Polygon
item.description: We talk about our favorite shapes. Just kidding. This Polygon promises the Ethereum you know and love at a fraction of the cost.
item.itunes:title: Ep 019: Polygon
item.itunes:summary: We talk about our favorite shapes. Just kidding. This Polygon promises the Ethereum you know and love at a fraction of the cost.
item.itunes:subtitle: We talk about our favorite shapes.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: Ep 020: Season 1 Wrap Up
item.description: A meta episode. We close out our first season and talk about what's coming next for Candid Crypto!
item.itunes:title: Ep 020: Season 1 Wrap Up
item.itunes:summary: A meta episode. We close out our first season and talk about what's coming next for Candid Crypto!
item.itunes:subtitle: A meta episode.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: [Season 2!! E1] Security Tokens and STM with Jason Barraza
item.description: We kick off season 2 of Candid Crypto with our first guest, Jason Barraza. In this episode, we discuss Security Tokens, which are tokens could represent ownership of any valuable financial assets like stocks or real estate.
item.itunes:title: [Season 2!! E1] Security Tokens and STM with Jason Barraza
item.itunes:summary: We kick off season 2 of Candid Crypto with our first guest, Jason Barraza. In this episode, we discuss Security Tokens, which are tokens could represent ownership of any valuable financial assets like stocks or real estate.
item.itunes:subtitle: We kick off season 2 of Candid Crypto with our first guest, Jason Barraza.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: 022: The Merge
item.description: Michael and Liam review one of the most significant events in crypto for the second episode of season 2. "The Merge" is a game changer for the Ethereum blockchain and the sustainability of crypto. Tune in to learn why "The Merge" was essential for the world's second-largest blockchain, and how Ethereum will never be the same.
item.itunes:title: Ep 022: The Merge
item.itunes:summary: Michael and Liam review one of the most significant events in crypto for the second episode of season 2. "The Merge" is a game changer for the Ethereum blockchain and the sustainability of crypto. Tune in to learn why "The Merge" was essential for the world's second-largest blockchain, and how Ethereum will never be the same.
item.itunes:subtitle: Michael and Liam review one of the most significant events in crypto, "The Merge".
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: 023: DYOR II
item.description:
DYOR: Dig your own radishes? No! Do your own research. Learn the research process we use, and our fundamental questions. | Useful crypto research sites https://www.coingecko.com/
https://decrypt.co/
https://www.investopedia.com/
https://www.coindesk.com/
Tokenomics
https://thecoinperspective.com/
https://coinmarketcap.com/
item.itunes:title: Ep 023: DYOR II
item.itunes:summary:
Learn how this one simple trick can make your crypto experience much more enjoyable! | Useful crypto research sites https://www.coingecko.com/
https://decrypt.co/
https://www.investopedia.com/
https://www.coindesk.com/
Tokenomics
https://thecoinperspective.com/
https://coinmarketcap.com/
item.itunes:subtitle: Learn how this one simple trick can make your crypto experience much more enjoyable!
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: 024: Rug-Pull-a-Palooza
item.description: Crypto has always been risky, but recent failures of the most prominent crypto exchanges (FTX) and projects have made everyone aware that it is easy to lose your digital assets. Scams have never been more prevalent in the crypto space, which is why it is necessary to know the playbook of these fraudulent actors. In this episodes, Michael and Liam review the most common crypto scams and how to avoid them.
item.itunes:title: 024: Rug-Pull-a-Palooza
item.itunes:summary: Crypto has always been risky, but recent failures of the most prominent crypto exchanges (FTX) and projects have made everyone aware that it is easy to lose your digital assets. Scams have never been more prevalent in the crypto space, which is why it is necessary to know the playbook of these fraudulent actors. In this episodes, Michael and Liam review the most common crypto scams and how to avoid them.
item.itunes:subtitle: In this episodes, Michael and Liam review the most common crypto scams and how to avoid them.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit

item.title: 025: OpenBazaar
item.description: Explore the ambitious origins, transformations, and challenges of OpenBazaar, a revolutionary decentralized digital marketplace.
item.itunes:title: 025: OpenBazaar
item.itunes:summary: Join hosts Liam Stojanovic and Michael Edelheit as they delve deep into the story of OpenBazaar. From its conception at the 2014 Bitcoin Expo Hackathon as DarkMarket to its transformation into OpenBazaar, the episode covers the ups and downs of this groundbreaking project. Discover insights from behind-the-scenes, firsthand experiences as a seller, and the eventual decline and hopeful resurgence of the platform.
item.itunes:subtitle: Explore the ambitious origins, transformations, and challenges of OpenBazaar, a revolutionary decentralized digital marketplace.
item.itunes:author: Liam Stojanovic, Michael Edelheit
